'''Obees Ramee''' was a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was a fugitive hiding on [[Outland Transit Station]], where he supported himself by counterfeiting Republic [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and distributing them. This led to the station's [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] owner, [[Rozatta]], placing a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head offering 1,000 credits for his capture alive and 500 [[Death/Legends|dead]].

The [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] came across Ramee whilst the Gran, who had taken up work as an associate of [[Meeko Ghintee]]'s criminal syndicate, was practicing with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] at a shooting range. Ramee and several others at the range attacked Fett, but were defeated by the hunter who then claimed the bounty on Ramee, capturing him alive for 1,000 credits.<ref name="Bounty" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]], ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', Obees is the fifth of five possible secondary bounties that a player can secure in the [[Star_Wars: Bounty Hunter#Pit Fight Arena|pit fighters arena]] section of Chapter One. Players have the option of taking him alive or killing him; however, this article assumes that he is captured alive as he is worth more alive than dead.
